title: andropogon neesii subvar. leianthus
intro: Andropogon neesii subvar. leianthus, also known as the Khas or Indian grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of digestive problems. Andropogon neesii subvar. leianthus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
